# AI Tool Adoption Survey — Item Draft

**Module title: Faculty Burden and AI Tool Tensions**

## Section A: Workload Impact

1. How burdened are you by the AI tools your institution has introduced?
   (1 = not at all burdened, 5 = extremely burdened)

2. To what extent do AI tools create tension between your teaching
   responsibilities and your research duties?
   (1 = no tension, 5 = severe tension)

3. How much of a mismatch do you experience between what AI tools demand
   of you and the support your institution provides?
   (1 = no mismatch, 5 = very large mismatch)

## Section B: Open Text

4. In your own words, describe the challenges you face when using AI
   tools in your teaching or research.
